_comment: Cipher's structured ops tracker. Cipher owns this file. Claude Code reads it for situational awareness but does NOT write to it — completion reports in tasks/TASK-<NN>_DONE.md are how Claude Code communicates back.

main_app.notes: OAuth flows live for LinkedIn; GitHub/X/YouTube endpoints deployed, awaiting credentials

family_app.notes: Parent onboarding fixed; child invite flow working

marketing_site.notes: Astro migration done; blog at /blog with 1 post live

browser_extension.notes: Install-via-developer-mode only; Chrome Web Store submission outstanding

blockers.description: Need Gandelf7 to register GitHub, Google, and X OAuth apps and provide client_id + secret for each
blocks: full OAuth coverage on Profiles tab

blockers.description: Relayer wallet 0x9DF7Ccc1A560303520D138e14ef6bDD15f364249 at 0.2 MATIC — enough for current cohort but not a second one
Instagram, TikTok, Facebook OAuth blocked by platform product approvals (1-3 weeks each)
